import axios from'axios';const api=axios.create({baseURL:'/api'});// Posts
export const fetchFeed=()=>api.get('/posts/feed');export const fetchAllPosts=()=>api.get('/posts');export const createPost=content=>api.post('/posts',{content});export const deletePost=id=>api.delete("/posts/".concat(id));export const toggleLike=id=>api.post("/posts/".concat(id,"/like"));export const addComment=(id,text)=>api.post("/posts/".concat(id,"/comments"),{text});export const deleteComment=(postId,commentId)=>api.delete("/posts/".concat(postId,"/comments/").concat(commentId));// Reels
export const fetchReels=()=>api.get('/reels');export const createReel=(videoUrl,caption,thumbnail,duration)=>api.post('/reels',{videoUrl,caption,thumbnail,duration});export const deleteReel=id=>api.delete("/reels/".concat(id));export const toggleLikeReel=id=>api.post("/reels/".concat(id,"/like"));export const addReelComment=(id,text)=>api.post("/reels/".concat(id,"/comments"),{text});export const deleteReelComment=(reelId,commentId)=>api.delete("/reels/".concat(reelId,"/comments/").concat(commentId));export const getReel=id=>api.get("/reels/".concat(id));// Messages
export const sendMessage=(receiverId,content,mediaUrl,mediaType)=>api.post('/messages',{receiverId,content,mediaUrl,mediaType});export const fetchConversation=userId=>api.get("/messages/".concat(userId));export const fetchConversations=()=>api.get('/messages/conversations');export const markMessageAsRead=messageId=>api.put("/messages/".concat(messageId,"/read"));export const deleteMessage=id=>api.delete("/messages/".concat(id));// Users
export const getUserProfile=username=>api.get("/users/".concat(username));export const updateProfile=data=>api.put('/users/profile',data);export const toggleFollow=id=>api.post("/users/".concat(id,"/follow"));export const searchUsers=q=>api.get("/users/search?q=".concat(q));export default api;
